description: §61.4 — a wildcard `<_>` arm satisfies exhaustiveness over the `accepts=` enum: an `<endpoint>` with only `FleetStatus` + a `<_>` arm covers the un-armed `Dispatch`/`DeltaSince` variants, so E-ENDPOINT-NOT-EXHAUSTIVE does NOT fire (reusing the §18.8.1 wildcard rule).
rationale: §61.4: the arms reuse the §18.0.1/§51 exhaustiveness machinery, where a wildcard `<_>` arm covers every un-armed variant. So a `FleetStatus` + `<_>` pair is exhaustive and the family stays silent.
